caption: A woman with dark hair and a striped purple and white collared shirt is centered in the shot, wearing a black over-the-ear headset with a microphone. She is positioned in a room with a pale wall and a light-colored curtain to her left, with a flat surface visible behind her on the right. Across the sequence, she is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift as she talks. In the final frame, she begins to lift her right hand toward her chest. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each shot. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the woman as she interacts with someone off-screen.
